findings.problem: The repaired docs still leave the task surface short of the declared public post-reset field contract: task 3.3.1 does not include `last_special_scene_correction=none`, even though the design baseline and field contract table now publish `last_special_scene_correction` as a required public debug field alongside `active_module`, `scene_override_source`, and `roadblock_interface_state`.
findings.evidence: /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/openspec/changes/refactor-old-2-steering-control/tasks.md:51 defines the post-reset clean baseline task with `active_module=straight`, `scene_override_source=none`, and `roadblock_interface_state=supported_not_implemented`, but omits `last_special_scene_correction=none`. /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/openspec/changes/refactor-old-2-steering-control/design.md:207-211 defines the diagnostic source fields in the post-reset baseline as `active_module=straight`, `scene_override_source=none`, `roadblock_interface_state=supported_not_implemented`, and `last_special_scene_correction=none`. /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/openspec/changes/refactor-old-2-steering-control/design.md:394-398 publishes the field contract table with the same exact public field names, including `last_special_scene_correction`.
findings.recommendation: Update task 3.3.1 so the post-reset clean baseline uses the full exact public field-name set from the field contract table, including `last_special_scene_correction=none`, and keep that wording aligned with the design baseline.
